welcome.title: Welcome to Bolsillo Claro!
welcome.subtitle: We'll help you set up your account in 3 simple steps so you can start managing your finances
welcome.skipWarning: Are you sure? You'll need to set everything up manually later

createAccount.title: Create Your First Account
createAccount.subtitle: Step 1 of 3
createAccount.hint: An 'account' is where you organize your money. For example: 'My Personal Finances' or 'Family Budget'
createAccount.currencyHint: This will be your account's main currency. You can still record expenses in other currencies

validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 3 characters

firstExpense.title: Want to add your first expense?
firstExpense.subtitle: Step 2 of 3 (Optional)
firstExpense.hint: Example: If you spent $500 at the supermarket, you can log it here to keep track
firstExpense.optional: This step is optional. You can do it later from the Dashboard

completed.title: All Set! You're Ready to Use Bolsillo Claro
completed.subtitle: Everything is configured

checklist.transactions: You can add expenses and incomes
checklist.reports: You'll see reports of your finances

tips.title: 💡 Tips to get started:
tips.tip1: Log your daily expenses to see where you spend
tips.tip2: Use categories to better organize your expenses
tips.tip3: Check reports to understand your finances
